title: alter-actions
description: Trigger Alter macOS app actions via x-callback-urls.
description_zh: 透過 x-callback-urls 觸發更改 macOS 應用程式操作。
original_description: Trigger Alter macOS app actions via x-callback-urls.

title: apple-contacts
description: Look up contacts from macOS Contacts.app.
description_zh: 從 macOS Contacts.app 尋找聯絡人。
original_description: Look up contacts from macOS Contacts.app.

title: apple-find-my-local

description_zh: 透過 Peekaboo 控制 Apple Find My 應用程式來定位人員、裝置和物品 (AirTags)
original_description: Control Apple Find My app via Peekaboo to locate people, devices, and items (AirTags)

title: apple-health-skill
description: Talk to your Apple Health data — ask questions about your workouts, heart rate, activity rings, and fitness trends.
description_zh: 查閱您的 Apple Health 數據 — 詢問有關您的運動、心率、活動環和健身趨勢的問題。
original_description: Talk to your Apple Health data — ask questions about your workouts, heart rate, activity rings, and fitness trends.

title: apple-mail-search
description: Fast Apple Mail search via SQLite on macOS.
description_zh: 在 macOS 上透過 SQLite 快速搜尋 Apple Mail。
original_description: Fast Apple Mail search via SQLite on macOS.

title: apple-music
description: Search Apple Music, add songs to library, manage playlists, control.
description_zh: 搜尋 Apple Music、將歌曲新增至庫、管理播放清單、控制。
original_description: Search Apple Music, add songs to library, manage playlists, control.

title: apple-photos
description: Apple Photos.app integration for macOS.
description_zh: 適用於 macOS 的 Apple Photos.app 整合。

title: apple-remind-me
description: Natural language reminders that create actual Apple.
description_zh: 自然語言提醒創造了真正的蘋果。
original_description: Natural language reminders that create actual Apple.

title: apple-search-ads-skill
description: Manage Apple Search Ads campaigns, ad groups, keywords, and reports via the asa-cli tool.
description_zh: 透過 asa-cli 工具管理 Apple Search Ads 廣告活動、廣告群組、關鍵字和報導。
original_description: Manage Apple Search Ads campaigns, ad groups, keywords, and reports via the asa-cli tool.

title: appletv
description: Control Apple TV via pyatv.
description_zh: 透過 pyatv 控制 Apple TV。
original_description: Control Apple TV via pyatv.

title: callmac

description_zh: 使用 /callmac 等命令從行動裝置對 Mac 進行遠端語音控制。
original_description: Remote voice control for Mac from mobile devices using commands like /callmac.

description: Build the Clawdbot macOS menu bar app.

original_description: Analyze iMessage (macOS) and Signal conversation history to reveal relationship dynamics — message volume.

original_description: Print text, images, and QR codes to a wireless Bluetooth thermal printer.
